title: LLM Agent GA Profile
bestFor: An AI agent product that needs GA proof across real LLM, E2E, product API, SCM, and CI/CD boundaries.

matrixSeed.requiredEvidence: Product trace records real provider and model usage for the GA scenario.
Playwright report or trace proves the release candidate user workflow reaches terminal success.
Product-native release decision returns GO with targetReached=true for the GA target.
